SEARCH
Package com.comp2042.view.manager

Class HudManager

java.lang.Object
com.comp2042.view.manager.HudManager
public class HudManager extends Object
Manages heads-up display (HUD) components including score, level, timers, and statistics. Uses UIHelper for common UI operations.
Author:
Dong, Jia
